Description: Create the minimal uv-managed Python project skeleton, config, and shared logging needed for the local pipeline.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add pyproject metadata, runtime dependencies, and dev dependencies so the project can be run and tested via uv.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The repository contains uv-compatible project metadata and pytest tooling configuration.

Stories.StoryDescription: Create the src and tests package layout for the Memory Picker application and its unit tests.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The repository has a src/memory_picker package and a tests structure ready for unit and integration tests.

Stories.StoryDescription: Define typed settings and constants for supported formats, managed folder names, and quality thresholds.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The application exposes a typed config surface for root path, extensions, folder names, and quality thresholds.

Stories.StoryDescription: Create logging configuration that can be reused across all pipeline modules.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Pipeline modules can use a shared logging setup with configurable log level.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add a first test proving the package imports and settings load correctly.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: A smoke test covers package import and settings defaults.
